meaning: n.蹦床n.(杂技表演中翻筋斗用的) 蹦床,弹床
examples: Have you ever jumped on a trampoline?
Whenever you are on a trampoline, be careful not to jump near the edge of it.
Next to the courts, there is a basketball court, a jungle gym and a giant trampoline.
It corresponded to an estimated five-fold increase in trampoline sales during the same period.
